meaning: adj.经不住海上风浪的,不适于航海的
examples: As their flimsy craft grew more and more unseaworthy, the other boat abandoned them and sailed on.
Despite many warnings that the ferry was unseaworthy and frequently overloaded, the ferry owner managed to pay inspectors to turn a blind eye.
On Wednesday afternoon, five cocklers were helped by Lytham RNLI after their unseaworthy boat's engine failed.
In fact, he had holes bored through the hulls to render them unseaworthy.
